assets.name: Viral Topic Selection
assets.description: Helps AI evaluate content topics for viral potential — checking tension, curiosity gap, emotional resonance, and social currency.
assets.description_zh: 帮助 AI 判断内容选题的传播潜力——检查冲突张力、好奇心缺口、情绪共鸣和社交货币。

assets.name: Title Attraction
assets.description: Helps AI evaluate title attraction — checking audience clarity, information gap, specific benefit, credibility, and promise-content alignment.
assets.description_zh: 帮助 AI 判断标题吸引力——检查受众明确度、信息缺口、具体利益、可信度和承诺匹配度。

assets.name: Short Video Hook Judgment
assets.description: Helps AI evaluate short video opening hooks — checking first-3-second gap, scene conflict, speakability, and audience retention signals.
assets.description_zh: 帮助 AI 判断短视频开头前三秒的钩子效果——检查信息缺口、场景冲突、口播顺口度和留存信号。

assets.name: Project Context Judgment
assets.description: Judges what belongs in an Agent-facing project document (AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md / .cursorrules) — classifying each candidate line into CARRY / RELOCATE / DROP / CONVERT.
assets.description_zh: 判断 AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md / .cursorrules 等项目文档的每一行内容——将候选行归类为 CARRY / RELOCATE / DROP / CONVERT。

assets.name: Completion Adjudication
assets.description: Judges whether an AI Agent's 'I'm done' claim is actually done — forcing a four-cell ruling (DONE CLAIM / OBSERVABLE PROOF / USER INTENT MATCH / UNRESOLVED RISK) before completion is accepted.
assets.description_zh: 判断 AI Agent 的「我完成了」声明是否真的完成——强制要求四格裁决（DONE CLAIM / OBSERVABLE PROOF / USER INTENT MATCH / UNRESOLVED RISK）。
